context: This criteria evaluates whether the agent follows the intended operator workflow for a standard Prometheus query using the bundled scripts and environment-driven configuration.

checklist.name: validates configuration first
checklist.description: Runs configuration validation (e.g., `python3 scripts/check_config.py` or `python3 scripts/prom_query.py config`) and inspects the `valid` field before any query attempt. Flexible on the exact script path as long as the bundled validation is used.

checklist.name: uses prom_query query command
checklist.description: Uses the bundled query command (e.g., `python3 scripts/prom_query.py query --expr 'up'`) when configuration is valid. Flexible on the exact script path. If configuration is invalid, explicitly explain the block and avoid attempting the query.

checklist.name: does not invent environment defaults
checklist.description: Treats Prometheus URL, token URL, client ID, and client secret as provided inputs rather than assuming values.

checklist.name: explains auth source
checklist.description: If query runs, explicitly reports `auth_source` (`cache` or `token_endpoint`). If preflight is invalid and query is intentionally skipped, it must still explain that token source cannot be determined yet and how to validate it once config is valid.
